Motion To Compel Plaintiff Attendance And Testimony At Deposition; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT YINGTI LIU's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Attendance And Testimony At Deposition; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted. Request for sanctions is granted against Plaintiff Marta L. Ramos Revolorio in the amount of $393.16. Unopposed.

Defendant to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
